instruction:
In TextEdit, type the following text exactly, preserving line breaks:
Quarterly ops review
- Confirm vendor timeline
- Send final budget draft

command: osascript -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to if (count of documents) = 0 then make new document'
osascript -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to set text of document 1 to ""'

reference_command:
peekaboo app launch "TextEdit" && peekaboo type 'Quarterly ops review
- Confirm vendor timeline
- Send final budget draft'

parameters.expected_content:
Quarterly ops review
- Confirm vendor timeline
- Send final budget draft
